title: LifeTime
description: A highly customizable Minecraft mod that adds two in-game timers: a World Timer tracking total playtime and a Session Timer tracking current play sessions. Features full color customization (including rainbow effects), draggable HUD positioning, and flexib
body:
# 🚀 Description

Take full control of your playtime with this highly customizable Minecraft timer mod!

This mod adds two powerful in-game timers designed to help you track your gameplay like never before:

- ⏱️ World Timer – Tracks the total time spent in a world or server
- ⏳ Session Timer – Tracks your current play session since joining

Every detail of your timers can be customized:

- Individual colors for every time unit (seconds, minutes, hours, days)
- Fully independent styling for each element
- Rainbow color effect for dynamic visuals 🌈
- Adjustable formatting and display style
- Drag & drop positioning — move timers anywhere on your screen
- Toggle visibility and layout options

By default, the Total Time counter is enabled and displayed in white.

## ⚙️ Easy Configuration (Mod Menu Required)

All advanced settings (like enabling the Session Timer, changing colors, or UI customization) require:

**[MOD MENU](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**

## 🧩 Commands Included

Control your timers anytime with simple commands:

- /totaltime pause → Pause the Total Time counter
- /totaltime start → Resume the Total Time counter
- /sessiontimer pause → Pause the Session Timer
- /sessiontimer start → Resume the Session Timer

_💡 These commands are client-side focused and do not give gameplay advantages, making them safe for most servers._

## 🌍 Multiplayer & Singleplayer Ready

Works seamlessly in:

- Singleplayer worlds
- Multiplayer servers

_Lightweight, non-intrusive, and performance-friendly._

## ⚙️ Required mods:
_Fabric:_
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Yet Another Config Lib(YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

_NeoForge:_
- [Yet Another Config Lib(YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

### 💡 Why this mod?

Perfect for players who want to:

- Track grind sessions ⛏️
- Monitor world playtime 📊
- Improve productivity or speedrun tracking ⚡
- Customize their HUD completely 🎯
